prompt: I have project 44cd9c76 as the target and project c063f41e as the previous video. Copy the previous video's caption fixes, caption style settings, and text overlay placement to the target. Also tell me what cannot be copied through the public API.
assertions: Uses /projects/{id}/context?mode=full for both projects before writing.
Copies caption settings with /projects/{id}/captions/style instead of /caption-themes.
Mentions project rename and background audio insertion are not exposed publicly.
